@jakebailey I'm not sure, but I think the bot is supposed to be editing the initial message instead of sending new ones, correct? Also, I can't merge this PR myself since the bot can't tell that it's ready to merge, if you or someone would take a look at it for me (just updated owners) that would be much appreciated.

Some highly unintended behavior is afoot, it doesn't seem to be editing comments at all and instead just posts a new one  very time. Reference: #75096
